subcodes.first_line: My God, my Adored One, the Object of my worship, the All-Bountiful, the Most Merciful, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise, the All-Forgiving, the Concealer of faults, the Bestower! Thou beholdest Thy loved ones amidst [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الها معبودا مسجودا کریما رحیما علیما حکیما غفارا ستارا وهابا تری اولیائک بین
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @prayer for protection, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @exhortations and counsels
